about.intro: Mirlo provides a user-friendly space to help artists sell digital music, receive financial support, manage mailing lists, and share with their supporters.
about.missionStatement: <1>The music industry does not work for artists or listeners and needs a radical re-imagining.</1><2>Mirlo hosts a community of artists, listeners, organizers, and coders who are daring to do just that: taking lessons learned from working in the solidarity economy and applying them to our platform.</2><3>We are building an online audio distribution and patronage platform that aims to be radical, accessible, open source (free & libre), modular, and standards based.</3>
about.linkToDocumentation: For a thorough look at how Mirlo works, check out our documentation.
about.featuresText:
Mirlo provides a space for artists to upload their music, establish their online presence, sell their music, and receive ongoing monthly contributions from their audience.

For a thorough look at our features for artists, check out our features page.
about.morePricing: As we develop our project and come to terms with costs of running it, we will tweak these numbers and explore new ways of paying for the service and our work.

label.addNewArtistExplanation: Create a new artist page and add it to your roster. This is useful if you want to create a page for an artist that doesn't have one yet. The artist will be able to claim the page and take over management of it.

checkoutError.generic: We couldn't finish your checkout. Please try again or contact support if the issue keeps happening.

manage.stripeResetCodeFailed: Couldn't send the verification code. Try again in a moment.

manageMerch.externalUrlDescription: If set, the public buy button will send listeners to this URL (with a leaving-Mirlo confirmation) instead of using Mirlo's checkout. Leave blank to sell through Mirlo.
manageMerch.dropFilesHere: Drop files here, or click to select files.
manageMerch.fileTooLarge: "{{filename}}" is too large. Downloadable content must be {{maxSize}}MB or smaller.
manageMerch.relatedToTrackGroup: Does buying this merch item give the customer access to a digital copy of an album? (optional)

manageMerch.areYouSureDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this merch item?
manageMerch.quantityRemainingDescription: Leave blank for unlimited stock, or set to 0 to mark as unavailable. Note that if any quantity remaining is set in the options, we'll use that to calculate the amount remaining.
manageMerch.isPublicNotSet: This merch item is not yet publicly visible. Toggle this to set it live!
manageMerch.isPublicSet: Should this merch item be publicly listed?
manageMerch.zeroShippingConfirmBody: Your shipping costs are all set to 0. Are you sure you want to make this item public?
manageMerch.merchOptionsExplainer: Does your merch come in different categories? For example t-shirt size?
manageMerch.downloadableContent: Does the user get to download anything after purchase?
manageMerch.relatedDownloadableContentInfo: Purchasing this merch will also allow access to this content.
manageMerch.trackGroupRelatedDownloadableContent: Purchasing this release will also allow the download of this content.
manageMerch.merchFulfillmentParagraph: To manage orders for merch, check your fulfillment page
manageMerch.setDifferentCostPerDestination: You'll want to set a different shipping cost per destination. It's likely much more expensive to ship to another country

paymentSlider.howMuchModalText: Mirlo thrives on artist contributions—whether through monthly support or a slice of release sales. But we get it: every cent counts, and only you know what you can afford. That’s why we let you decide how much of your sales goes to Mirlo. Your art, your call.
paymentSlider.howMuchModalRowFullCostDescription: Best estimate to cover all our work.
paymentSlider.howMuchModalRowRedistributionDescription: You really want to see Mirlo succeed and you can afford it.
paymentSlider.howMuchModalCalculator: If you're having trouble deciding on a rate, you can use <link>this sliding scale calculator</link> for individuals (in english) provided by the Aorta Co-operative.
paymentSlider.howMuchModalFinances: Curious about how Mirlo uses money? We post quarterly financial statements <link>on our blog</link>.

manageAlbum.removingFundraiserWithPledgesWarning: This release has an active fundraiser with {{ count }} pledges. Are you sure you want to remove the fundraiser? This will cancel all current pledges.
manageAlbum.allowMirloPromoLabel: Allow Mirlo to use it for promotion?
manageAlbum.defaultTrackAllowIndividualSale: By default, tracks will be available for individual sale.
manageAlbum.defaultTrackMinPrice: By default, tracks will have this minimum price.
manageAlbum.chargePledgesSuccess: Successfully charged all current pledges for this fundraiser.
manageAlbum.addFundraiserDescription: Create a new fundraiser to support this release.
manageAlbum.addFundraiserToThisRelease: Add a fundraiser to this release
manageAlbum.urlSlugWarning: Changes to this value will break existing links to this album.
manageAlbum.urlSlugHint: The URL will be generated automatically from the album title.
manageAlbum.isGettable: Prevent users from downloading and buying this release
manageAlbum.isGettableTooltip: Turn this on if you only want people to stream the release. When enabled, downloads and purchases are disabled.
manageAlbum.isGettableInfo: Leave this unchecked to let fans buy or download your release. Checking it means listeners can only stream it for free.
manageAlbum.currencyIsSetOnManageArtist: The currency is set by the payment processor you've linked on the manage artist page.
manageAlbum.tracksMissingTitle: {{ count }} tracks are missing a title. Are you sure you want to continue?
manageAlbum.isAllOrNothingDescription: If this is enabled, supporters will only be charged if the fundraising goal is met.
manageAlbum.fundraiserComplete: Fundraiser complete — pledges charged, release is now on sale.
manageAlbum.noTracks: You have no tracks listed on this release, are you sure you want to continue?
manageAlbum.fundraisingGoalDescription: The target amount you aim to raise in relation to this release.
manageAlbum.allowMirloPromo: Allow Mirlo's <hype>Hype Circle</hype> to use these tracks for promotional material of the platform. You will be credited, and can set this for individual tracks.
manageAlbum.setPriceOfAllTracks: Set the price on all tracks
manageAlbum.setAllTracksAsPreview: Set all tracks as free listen
manageAlbum.setAllTracksAsMustOwn: Set all tracks as must own
manageAlbum.dontSeeTheLicenseYouWant: Don't see the license you want for this track?
manageAlbum.isrcInvalid: Invalid ISRC format. Expected: CC-XXX-YY-NNNNN (e.g. US-RC1-76-07839)
manageAlbum.allowSaleDescription: Allow users to buy this track individually
manageAlbum.whatMeanLicense: Don't know what this means? It's safe to leave it blank. Depending on your country, your work is most likely already copyrighted under the Berne Convention and/or the TRIPS agreement (more about it here).
manageAlbum.title: Title
manageAlbum.publishedDescription: Published releases can be bought and listened to.
manageAlbum.areYouSurePublish: Some of your tracks are still processing and won't be available for download. Are you sure?
manageAlbum.schedulePublicationModalBody: Select a publication date for your release. When this date arrives, your release will go live. If you've set it to "public", your followers will receive a notification at that moment. If set to "private", the notification will only be sent when you make your release public and update it.
manageAlbum.scheduledPublicationLabel: Will be published automatically on {{ date }}
manageAlbum.cancelSchedulePublicationModalBody: Are you sure you want to cancel the scheduled publication? Your release will stay as a draft until you schedule it again or publish it manually.
manageAlbum.publishDisabledNoTracks: Add at least one track or set a fundraising goal before publishing.
manageAlbum.publishedSuccess: Successfully published release, it's now publicly available.
manageAlbum.preorderTrackInfo: When you setup your release as a pre-order, your tracks are automatically made non-streamable by default during the pre-order campaign. Head over to the track section and replace "must own" with "free listen" on the tracks you would like to be previewable during that time, these tracks will also be downloadable by those who pre-order your release.
manageAlbum.schedulePreorderReleaseDate: Schedule the pre-order campaign to end on release date
manageAlbum.releaseDatePreorderHint: When the release date arrives, the pre-order campaign will automatically end and the release becomes available for download to those who pre-ordered. Be careful that the date is correct and everything is in order on the release page! When the pre-order campaign ends, a notification will be sent to your followers and subscribers that the album is now available, and people who pre-ordered will receive a download link to the full release.
manageAlbum.noReleaseDateSet: You need to set a release date first in the Key Details section before you can schedule the end of the pre-order campaign.
manageAlbum.releaseDateInPast: Your release date is in the past. Update it to a future date in the Key Details section before scheduling the end of the pre-order campaign, otherwise the campaign would end immediately as soon as you publish your release.
manageAlbum.removeScheduleOnDateChangeWarning: Your release date currently determines the end of your pre-order campaign and the full release of your album! Changing it will remove the scheduler and you'll have to end your pre-order campaign manually. Do you want to continue?
manageAlbum.schedulePreorderNotPublicationHint: Attention! This doesn't schedule your album's publication. It only controls when it transitions from "pre-order" to "released". You'll still need to publish the album manually to make it visible to your listeners.
manageAlbum.makeTracksPreviewableOnRelease: Set all tracks as playable on release day
manageAlbum.setTracksAsFreeListen: Set all tracks as playable on release day
manageAlbum.releasePreorderHint: Click this button when you're ready to end the pre-order campaign if you prefer to activate that manually on release day (Have a particular time you want to release at? You'd rather be around for the release moment?).
manageAlbum.endPreorderConfirmation: Are you sure you want to release this pre-order? This will make the full release available for download to those who pre-ordered, and a notification will be sent to your followers and subscribers telling them it's now officially released.
manageAlbum.endPreorderNotPublished: This button only triggers the end of the pre-order campaign, changing the status of your release from "pre-order" to "released". You need to publish the album first to start the pre-order campaign and make it visible to your listeners.
manageAlbum.releaseDateInfoText: If left empty, the date will be set automatically when your release goes live. Note that setting this has no impact on your album page visibility.
manageAlbum.releaseDateScheduledHint: Important! This date now controls when your pre-order campaign ends and your release becomes fully available. Make sure it's set correctly.
manageAlbum.visibilityPublicHint: After publishing, your release will be visible on your artist page and searchable on Mirlo. Your followers will also receive a notification.
manageAlbum.visibilityPublicHintPublished: After updating your release, it will be visible on your artist page and searchable on Mirlo.
manageAlbum.visibilityPublicHintPublishedNotYetNotif: After updating your release, it will be visible on your artist page and searchable on Mirlo. Your followers will also receive a notification.
manageAlbum.visibilityPrivateHint: After publishing, your release will only be accessible to people you share the URL with. It won't appear anywhere on the site, and no notifications will be sent.
manageAlbum.visibilityPrivateHintPublished: After updating your release, it will only be accessible to people you share the URL with and won't appear anywhere on the site.
manageAlbum.publishNowInsteadOf: You've set a future publication date of {{ futureDate }}. Do you want to publish it now instead?
manageAlbum.uploadTracksDescription: Attach files from your computer to get started uploading tracks.
manageAlbum.trackArtistsHelp: Who are the artists involved in making this track? List as many as you like, alongside their role.
manageAlbum.statusHelp: Can the user listen to the track without owning it?
manageAlbum.coAuthorCheck: Display this artist's name next to the track title on the release page (as a featured guest or a secondary main artist)
manageAlbum.priceZeroOrMore: Price must be zero or more.
manageAlbum.madePrivate: Your release has been made private. You are now the only person able to see it.
manageAlbum.dropFilesHere: Drop files here, or click to select files.
manageAlbum.manageOnSubscription: Want this album to be received automatically by supporters? Manage <subscriptionLink>your subscription tiers</subscriptionTiers>.
manageAlbum.albumNotAvailableForPurchase: When published, this release will not be available for purchase by the public but will be discoverable.
manageAlbum.pricingHelp: This sets the minimum amount listeners must pay to be able to download your release, but they can still listen to the tracks you've setup as "previewable" for free.
manageAlbum.pricingHelpWithLimit_one: This sets the minimum amount listeners must pay to be able to download your release, but they can still listen to the tracks you've setup as "previewable" for free {{count}} time before being asked to buy.
manageAlbum.pricingHelpWithLimit_other: This sets the minimum amount listeners must pay to be able to download your release, but they can still listen to the tracks you've setup as "previewable" for free {{count}} times before being asked to buy.
manageAlbum.albumGrantedBySubscriptionTier: When published, supporters at these tiers will have receive this release: {{tiers}}.
manageAlbum.albumGrantedToSubscriptionTiersWhenPubli: When published, this release will become available to supporters at these tiers: {{tiers}}.
manageAlbum.minimumPriceDescription: Minimum price to pay to get download access.
manageAlbum.suggestedPriceDescription: Shown as the starting amount at checkout.
manageAlbum.suggestedPriceDescriptionClarifier: Supporters can change this amount, but they cannot pay below your minimum price.
manageAlbum.artistOnMirlo: Artist with a presence on Mirlo
manageAlbum.nameOfAccountToReceivePayment: Name of the account that will receive payments for this release.
manageAlbum.receivePaymentDescription: You are seeing this because you are part of a label. This is the account that will receive payments for this release. If you are part of a label or collective, this will be the label or collective account. Go to your <artistPage>artist page</artistPage> to manage these relationships. If you leave this blank, payments will continue going to your personal account.
manageAlbum.labelReceivePaymentDescription: You are a label who can manage releases for this artist. This is the account that will receive payments for this release. Go to your <labelPage>label page</labelPage> to manage these relationships. If you leave this blank, payments will go to the artist's personal account.
manageAlbum.thereWasAnError: There was an error uploading this track.
manageAlbum.doneUploading: Uploaded all tracks. We still need to process them on our servers, but you can now safely close the browser.
manageAlbum.uploadingTracks: Uploading tracks. This could take several minutes, please don't close the browser.

artistForm.allowDirectMessagesDescription: When enabled, logged-in listeners can send you a message through your profile. Messages arrive as a notification and by email.
artistForm.announcementDescription: This announcement will appear at the top of the profile page in a highlighted box. Leave it blank to not display anything. You can format it with Markdown syntax.
artistForm.areYouSureDelete: Are your sure you want to delete this profile page?
artistForm.whatLabelsisThisArtistPartOf: What label is this artist a part of?
artistForm.maxFreePlaysDescription: How many times can a user listen to a track before they have to buy it or add it to their collection? This only applies to tracks not in a user's collection. Leaving this zero or blank will mean unlimited.
artistForm.backgroundImageDescription: the image that appears in the background of your page
artistForm.urlSlug: Text that will appear in the URL
artistForm.customTitlesDescription: You can change what words appear on some parts of your public profile.
artistForm.customTabTitlesDescription: You can change the label that appears on each tab. The first tab is the one that will be loaded by default.
artistForm.tabOrderDescription: Drag and drop to reorder how tabs appear on your public profile.
artistForm.defaultPlatformFeeDescription: This is the default platform cut that will be applied to all your releases. You can change it on a per-release basis.
artistForm.applyPlatformFeeToAll: Apply to all releases, merch, subscriptions, and tips
artistForm.applyPlatformFeeConfirm: This will overwrite the platform cut on every existing release, merch item, subscription tier, and tip tier for this artist. Continue?
artistForm.applyPlatformFeeError: Something went wrong applying the platform cut
artistForm.tileImageDescription: The image will be duplicated to cover the whole background area of the artist page.
artistForm.dimensionsTip: For the best effect, upload a {{maxDimensions}} size image. File size is limited to {{ maxSize }}.
artistForm.transparentContainerDescription: Hides the page background color so a background image shows through behind your content.
artistForm.colorsSaveError: Could not save colors. Please try again.
artistForm.warningFeature: Warning: this is an experimental feature. You shouldn't rely on it.
artistForm.groupName: What should we show as the group type? Label? Collective?
artistForm.label: Label
artistForm.makeSearchable: Do you want to make this artist searchable on the social web? This will enable the ActivityPub protocol for this artist.
artistForm.makeStreamable: Do you want to make this artist streamable on federated players like Fairplayer?

manageSubscriptions.pasteEmailsHere: If you have a list of e-mail addresses, paste them here:
manageSubscriptions.uploadSubscriberData: Upload email addresses to the {{ artistName }} mailing list
manageSubscriptions.somethingWentWrongUploadingEmails: Something went wrong uploading e-mail addresses
manageSubscriptions.uploadACSV: Upload a CSV file of email addresses
manageSubscriptions.fileUploadDescription: If you have a CSV file that contains a list of e-mail addresses in CSV format, you can upload it here:
manageSubscriptions.looksGood: Alright, looks good, let's upload them!
manageSubscriptions.rightToUpload: By uploading this list of e-mail addresses, you solemnly swear that you have permission from the email owners to upload the emails.

artistSupporters.name: Name
artistSupporters.noSupportersYet: No supporters yet, share your profile with others to grow your community.

subscriptionForm.tierImageDescription: add an image to illustrate this support tier (optional)
subscriptionForm.interval: What's the interval for this subscription?
subscriptionForm.collectAddress: If rewards for this tier of support require shipping, collect the address of the supporter?
subscriptionForm.name: Name:
subscriptionForm.tipOnlySupportExplanation: Since you don't have any subscription tiers, visitors clicking your support tab will see this tip option directly.
subscriptionForm.allowVariableDescription: Allow supporters to enter a larger number?
subscriptionForm.autoAlbumPurchase: If a user subscribes at this tier, they'll automatically get every new release you release.
subscriptionForm.digitalDiscountPercent: Subscriber discount percent on digital purchases
subscriptionForm.minAmountError: The amount for a support tier must be more than or equal to 1.
subscriptionForm.discountPercentError: Discount percent must be between 0 and 100.
subscriptionForm.thankYouMessagesDescription: Add a personalized note that will appear in the emails supporters receive after they subscribe or purchase.
subscriptionForm.messagesUpdateError: We couldn't save your messages. Please try again.

footer.getInTouch: If you'd like to get in touch with Mirlo, join <discord>our Discord</discord>, <email>email us</email>, or check out <github>our Github</github>.
footer.aboutUs: <about>About us</about>, <documentation>Documentation</documentation>, <terms>Terms and conditions</terms>, <privacy>Privacy</privacy>, <cookie>Our use of cookies</cookie>, <content>Content policy</content>, <contact>Contact us</contact>

notifications.inviteToJoinLabel: <labelLink>{{labelName}}</labelLink> has invited you to join their label/collective.

admin.title: Title
admin.whatTaskCall: What task do you want to call on the server?
admin.disableArtistDescription: Please provide a reason for disabling this artist account. This message will be emailed to the artist.
admin.disableReasonPlaceholder: Enter the reason for disabling this artist...
admin.deleteArtistConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete artist {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
admin.disableReasonRequired: Please provide a reason for disabling this artist
admin.artistEnabledDescription: An artist who is enabled will have their music show up in search results. Their profile page will still be visible but only directly via URL.

trackGroupDetails.allOrNothingFullyFunded: This project is fully funded! Backing it now means you'll contribute to its future success.
trackGroupDetails.youWillBeChargedWhenItsFullyFunded: You will be charged when it's fully funded.
trackGroupDetails.redeemCodeError: Code not found or already used.
trackGroupDetails.noOtherInfoAboutThisAlbum: There is no other information about this release.
trackGroupDetails.notPublishedWarning: This release is not published yet, only you can see it.
trackGroupDetails.downloadCodecsInfo: Includes downloads in FLAC, WAV, mp3 and more. Paying supporters also get unlimited streaming on the Mirlo website.
trackGroupDetails.title: Title:
trackGroupDetails.noTracks: There are no tracks in this release yet.
trackGroupDetails.privateAlbumDescription: Private releases can not be listened to by Mirlo users.
trackGroupDetails.doesNotExist: This release does not exist or it does not have a public presence.

welcome.welcome: Welcome! Let's get you set up.
welcome.youCanChangeThis: You can always change this later.
welcome.whatPublicName: First, what's your public artist name?
welcome.showInTheURL: What should the artist page's URL be?
welcome.enterANameToGetStarted: Enter a name to get started
welcome.customizeYourPage: Customize what the artist page will look like.
welcome.takeMeToTheArtistPage: Skip this! Take me to the new artist page.
welcome.themeApplyError: Could not apply the theme. Please try again.
welcome.contentPolicyConfirmation: I confirm that my content complies with Mirlo's content policy. I understand that AI-generated music or artwork is not permitted on Mirlo.

manageTrackTable.areYouSureDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this track?

manageArtistTools.downloadCodesExplain: You can share promo codes with other people to give them free access to this release. Think press, friends, and family.
manageArtistTools.chooseAnAlbum: Choose a release to generate the promo codes for
manageArtistTools.urlCopied: Copied the link to your clipboard.

postForm.contentIsEmpty: Content is empty, are you sure you want to post?
postForm.titleIsEmpty: Title is empty, are you sure you want to post?
postForm.imageUploadSizeWarning: Recommended: keep image files under 15 MB for reliable upload and processing.
postForm.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this post?
postForm.title: Title
postForm.isSubscriptionPostOnly: Check this to limit the post to your subscribers. Leave it unchecked to make it available to everyone.
postForm.shouldSendEmail: Send an email to your supporters when this post is published?
postForm.shouldSendEmailContext: If yes, an e-mail will be sent and they will get notified on the website, if not, they'll only get the notification.
postForm.follow: Everyone who pressed the "Follow" button on your profile
postForm.ifNotPublic: Which of your subscription tiers should be the minimum tier to receive your posts?
postForm.changeSlug: click here to change the link.
postForm.slugTaken: This URL is taken, try something else.
postForm.slugWarning: Changes to this value will break existing links to this post.

errorPage.unexpectedError: Sorry, an unexpected error has occurred.

trackGroupEmbed.copyIframe: If you want to embed this music in another website, copy the code below:

home.support: <red>Directly support artists and independent labels.</red> Buy their music. Collectively owned and managed.
home.sustainedBy: Mirlo's work is sustained by our community, not by venture capital.
home.featuresLink: What is Mirlo? Check out <features>our features</features> and <about>about section</about>.
home.mirloConstruction:
Wanna talk more? E-mail us or join our Discord! Also check out our About page, and the code on GitHub.

Want to just receive our monthly newsletter? Sign up
home.supportUs: Want to support us as we grow Mirlo? <support>Pitch in</support>
home.newsletterDescription: Sign up to receive regular updates from the Mirlo team.
home.newsletterSuccess: Thanks! You're now on the list.
home.newsletterError: We couldn't add you to the mailing list. Please try again.
home.newsletterInvalidCode: That code doesn't look right. Make sure you entered the correct number, or click resend code.
home.newsletterVerificationHint: Verify your email below before signing up.
home.newsletterVerificationRequired: Please verify your email before signing up.
home.newsletterCaptchaRequired: Please complete the spam check before signing up.
home.newsletterVerifyingDescription: We're making sure you're not a robot.
home.newsletterCodeSentTo: We sent a verification code to {{email}}.

common.subscriptionPaymentFailedBanner: One or more of your subscription payments failed. Go to the artist profiles to renew them.
common.newVersionAvailable: A new version of Mirlo is available.
common.draftRestored: Some unsaved changes have been restored.

uploadPanel.keepBrowserOpen: Keep this tab open until uploads finish. You can keep browsing.

zipImport.existingTracksWarning: This release already has {{count}} track(s). Importing will add new tracks alongside them.
zipImport.importAlbumContent: Want to import your entire album in one go? Just drop a ZIP file with your tracks and metadata, and we'll take care of the rest.
zipImport.label: Label
zipImport.noAudioFilesFound: No audio files were found in this ZIP archive.
zipImport.title: Import tracks from ZIP
zipImport.subtitle: Drop a ZIP file here, or click to select one
zipImport.notAZipFile: That file is not a ZIP archive.
zipImport.zipUploadDescription: When you upload a zip file we'll do our best to parse the track information for content. This works best with flac files that have metadata tags filled out, but we'll try to parse whatever we can from any audio files. We'll also look for a cover image in the zip file, and any additional downloadable content. After the upload, you can review and edit the imported information before saving it to your release.
